title: Free Fire MAX
notes:
[Undersea Realm] Dive into the seabed in Bermuda and fight underwater! Try out the event weapon Hydro Blaster.
[New Character - Ray] Link to a target and knock them down when they're low on HP. A takedown resets the skill.  
[CS Random Events] Bigger starting funds, free Gloo Walls, and other random events shake up CS!
[Quick Messages] Smarter auto-trigger messages and pings for clearer comms.
[Pyro] Keep your fiery new companion active to level them up and unlock outfits.

title: Plants vs. Zombies™ 3: Evolved
notes:
WHAT’S NEW

Faster Progression: Fewer levels, less filler, more gameplay! Fewer + less = more!
Stronger Plants: Higher-tier plants hit harder with simpler leveling (max level 10)!
More Merging: Merging is the key to success in lane battle, and in life!

Smarter Counters: Wall-nuts block Bowling Zombies! Smart, right?
Plant Portraits: Level up plants to unlock pictures of plants!
Better Balance: Star score reflects your performance!
